ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment (e.g., Test I, Test II) */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Surprise tests, Seminars, Comprehensive Exam) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the assessment */,
  "weightage" TEXT /* Weightage of the assessment in the final grade */,
  "date_and_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the assessment */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or special instructions for the assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the assessment is conducted */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score possible for the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_assessment_type FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_type") REFERENCES assessment_types ("assessment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_types" (
  "assessment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of assessment */,
  "assessment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment type (e.g., Surprise tests, Seminars) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assessment type is currently in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course offers */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment schedule */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment being scheduled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "date_and_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the scheduled assessment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the assessment */,
  "special_instructions" TEXT /* Special instructions or remarks for the scheduled assessment */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assessment has been cancelled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_schedules_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade assigned for the assessment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the student submitted the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)
